llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to agenda announced. Board President Wells asked 'does anyone have changes to the agenda?' and received no response before proceeding to approval.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion. Seconded. Okay. Then we'll do a roll call. Trustee Lee. Aye. Trustee King. Aye. Trustee Marquez. Aye. Vice President Weekley. Aye. President Wall. Aye.
